_comment: Manual fixes for teams whose teams.json name does not resolve on TheSportsDB.
search  - query (string, or list tried in order) instead of the teams.json name
id      - TheSportsDB idTeam; skips search entirely, use for verified matches
country - expected API strCountry, overrides the teams.json country filter
note    - free text for humans, ignored by the script

rapid.note: no hit on 'Rapid' or 'Rapid Bucuresti'; the club is listed as Rapid 1923

jordan.note: 'Jordan' only finds a defunct motorsport team; found via the alternate 'Jordanien'

monaco.note: API says country Monaco, teams.json says France

craiova.note: id 138188; Romania also has FC U Craiova 1948 - check the crest if it looks wrong
